testcase.name: test_register_success

error.message: failed on setup with "pymongo.errors.InvalidURI: Invalid URI scheme: URI must begin with 'mongodb://' or 'mongodb+srv://'"

testcase.error: tests/test_email_auth.py:38: in db client = MongoClient(MONGO_URL) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/pymongo/mongo_client.py:766: in __init__ res = uri_parser.parse_uri( /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/pymongo/uri_parser.py:496: in parse_uri raise InvalidURI(f"Invalid URI scheme: URI must begin with '{SCHEME}' or '{SRV_SCHEME}'") E pymongo.errors.InvalidURI: Invalid URI scheme: URI must begin with 'mongodb://' or 'mongodb+srv://'
